title.rendered: Pier house Key West Wedding | Jamie + Alex

content.rendered:
“A conch can’t drown with water” – this is very true about the Keys! Despite the crazy Irma hurricane that recently hit our dear Keys, nothing could stop this destination wedding from happening in Key West.
Jamie and Alex and all 40 of their family and friends came all the way from Chicago for their beautiful wedding at the Pier House in Key West.
We had such an amazing time learning so much about these guys and how dedicated this Doctor and Dancer are with what they love. Nothing beats their dedication for their careers as much as their love for eachother does. We fell in love with their love story and their wedding day.
Check out some of the vendors we had the pleasure to work with and some of our favorite shots from this day. Congrats again guys on your marriage!
Getting ready location: Santa Maria Suites in Key West, FL
Ceremony location: St. Mary’s Church. Key West, FL
Reception location: Pier House Resort & Spa in Key West, FL
Hair – Pier House Spa
Cake – Cakes by Carol
Transportation- Old Town Trolley

excerpt.rendered: “A conch can’t drown with water” – this is very true about the Keys! Despite the crazy Irma hurricane that recently hit our dear Keys, nothing could stop this destination wedding from happening in Key West. Jamie and Alex and […]

title.rendered: JustinFit | Pembroke Pines In-Home Personal Trainer

content.rendered:
We’ve been doing a series of commercial photo shoots for Justin Seedman @ JustinFit.com.  We’ve never ever come across such a talented visionary who carefully crafts a personal at-home training program to fit your needs.

Not only is JustinFit an amazing team and company, Justin has managed to create an outstanding brand that truly reflects his style and we have created some back-end scenes that portray his workout philosophy as well as a storyline on how easy it is to work out at home while enjoying the view of your backyard or simply working out inside the home for the rainy days!

I personally have been serviced by Justin and I can’t imagine having a better trainer setup! He is very patient, kind and most importantly creates a workout plan that is based on discipline and quoting from one of his cool videos, “” but he says “motivation is not what’s holding them back…motivation is good, but discipline is better” – Justin Seedman.

I can’t agree any more! Workout sessions are so important and most of the people quit along the way because they do feel motivation is lacking, but if they used this principle of discipline, with a good balanced nutrition and having an amazing coach like JustinFit.

We all need a coach in our life, a mentor, who can motivate us when it’s time to push our limits and challenge our grounds, and I couldn’t recommend anyone better than Justin.  I wish I would’ve met him when I got married 9 years ago! But the timing has never been more perfect.

Whether you are seeking for an in-home personal trainer for your pre-wedding workouts, photo sessions, or just to look and feel amazing, JustinFit is your go-to team.  Feel great, stay in awesome shape, and most importantly be healthy!

I can’t wait to continue working with this amazing 5-star coach, entrepreneur, brand ambassador and family man.  Let’s rock n’roll!

title.rendered: Jessica + Carlos | Long Key Nature Center Wedding

content.rendered: This next, super awesome, FUN wedding, took place at the Long Key Nature Center in Davie, FL. So the day started off a little gloomy and it really seemed the rain was just going to take over Jessica and Carlos wedding. As we all know, you can’t really trust SoFlo when it comes to weather. I mean, one minute its cloudy, the next your sunbathing and next thing you know, there’s a hurricane! Yes, Florida can be a little crazy but thank goodness these guys missed Irma by a week! Obviously, sunshine took over and by took over I mean we sweated ourselves to death during the outdoor shots. Of course, this beautiful bride and groom looked flawless no matter what! We truly enjoyed shooting this beautiful wedding and absolutely loved the energy here. Jessica and Carlos, it was a pleasure working with your family and friends, they were a delight! Congrats again on your big day. By the way, none of this would’ve been possible without the lovely ladies at the Bombshell Makeover who took over the bride’s MUA and hair! Also, Brenda and the team from Posh Weddings & Events was just fantastic to be able to work with once again. Make sure to check them out. In the meantime, enjoy this little sneak peak:

Enjoy!

I don’t know about you guys but there is just something so romantic about horses and brides that we JUST love! title.rendered: Oleg | Portrait in Milan, Italy

content.rendered: With this next session, we say goodbye or better yet, “arrivederci” to our dear Milano. Yes, sad to say, all good things do come to an end..but this one is a “to be continued”. You guys know how much we love to travel and Italy is always in our hearts so we will for sure be back soon! Enough about us and let’s talk more about this cutie-pie|model|youtuber|Ukranian|guy right here: Oleg. This young model came to us for a quick session right in Milan. He wanted some street style-graffiti wall action so we gave it to him! What do you ladies think? Not only was he such a pleasure to work with, he was also extremely adorable and very easy going. Absolutely enjoyed working with you Oleg, we wish you the very best in your modeling career. Thank you for trusting us to do this for you! Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Corinna | Sunflower Portrait in Italy

content.rendered: Flower power is the theme of this next session! We went with Corinna to a huge sunflower field in the outskirts of Milan. Had this all planned out that no matter rain or shine, we were going to hit up the field! Well…it kind of started raining and, as we got close, there was ZERO rain…and zero sun! The problem with sunflowers is just that, if the sun is out they’re happy and bloomed. If it’s hiding, they’re super sad and depressed! We decided to make the best out of the situation and accomplish our mission: shoot rain or shine! Despite the sun not being out, absolutely loved the skies on this day! Mosquitoes once again chewed us alive, but we survived. Definitely was worth all the mosquito bites and sticky heat. Here are some of our faves from this hippie/flower power session:

title.rendered: Daniela + Arnaud | The Addison Boca Raton Wedding

content.rendered: What do Switzerland and Venezuela have in common? Germany! That is where this gorgeous couple met and started the beginning of their beautiful international love story. Daniela and Arnaud were trying to learn the German language when they met at school. This amazing love story flourished and made Arnaud follow her back to the states where they later tied the knot. A day full of emotions, happiness and joy. Their wedding took place at The Addison in Boca Raton. This amazing destination wedding with people from all over the world is living proof of all the family and friends that love this couple so much to make it all the way here for their special day. Fall in love with this couple like we did and live their love story through these pictures. Félicitations pour votre mariage, nous vous aimons tous les deux!

content.rendered: Its not everyday we get to take photos of ourselves so we decided to make this post special as our second baby boy is coming soon! title.rendered: Editorial Photo Session

content.rendered: This next session is something a little different than the usual. We wanted to do something creative and fun, so we decided to play a little dress-up. And by dress-up I mean we literally turned our photographer into a model. Ale says she has no modeling skills, but we think she was just holding it in. With the collaboration of two amazing artists, Joseline and Yolanda, we were able to rock this warrior princess look. Yolanda’s artistic skills were beyond amazing as she nailed the whole look with her MUA talents. Joseline finalized the look with her hair styling techniques to make this princess into a queen, with her incredible braiding skills and lots of creativity. What an honor to work with these talented ladies! Check out some of our favorite shots from this editorial-isque session: Warrior Princess interpretation, by Tica.

excerpt.rendered: This next session is something a little different than the usual. We wanted to do something creative and fun, so we decided to play a little dress-up. And by dress-up I mean we literally turned our photographer into a model. […]

title.rendered: Melissa + Elias | Miami Seaquarium Wedding

content.rendered: This next post is very dear to us as it’s our very own friends that tied the knot! We’ve known Melissa and her family for many years and we’ve seen her grow up to be this gorgeous bride and get married. Elias came into the picture a little later, but it didn’t take us too long to get to know him and love him just as much. Melissa and Elias aka, “Melias”, are just perfect for each other. They celebrated their big day with close family and friends at the Miami Seaquarium, where they said their “I do’s”. As a little surprise for their guests, we got to see an amazing dolphin show and get really close to these guys…by close, I mean, up-close-and-personal, close. They literally splashed water and soaked us. Don’t worry guys, the cameras were ok, at the end that’s all that matters LOL! Join us through these pictures and relive this very special day. Congrats again Melissa and Elias, we love you guys! Don’t forget to share #melias2016

title.rendered: Kelly + Kurt | Hilton Hotel Fort Lauderdale Wedding

content.rendered: This past weekend, we had the chance to shoot in one of our favorite Caribbean Islands, the Bahamas! Wait, JUST KIDDING! But it sure did feel like it with the crystal clear turquoise ocean waters. Kelly and Kurt got ready at the Hilton Resort in Fort Lauderdale Beach, where they later celebrated their wedding in a gorgeous environment. The day was perfect, the air was crisp, waters bluer than ever, and this bride shined like no other day. We captured a few emotional moments where we literally had to hold our tears in. You might remember them from their engagement session last spring. It was so great working with this couple once again.  Congrats again guys, it was an honor being part of your big day! Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Genevieve + Brian | Deerfield Beach Wedding

content.rendered: What is there not to love about destination weddings especially when you’re coming down to beautiful, sunny, South Florida? It’s all fun and games until bad weather hits your way the day before your wedding! Let’s face it, a little cool never hurt someone, but rain? Nobody wants that! Fortunately, these guys had a clear blue sky and gorgeous turquoise waters on the best day of their lives! Genevieve and Brian had a beautiful destination wedding in our backyards of Deerfield Beach. The day could not have been more perfect! If you’re viewing this from out of town or if you’re one of our locals, travel with us through these images as they got ready, saw each other for the first time, said I do, and celebrated their big day! Check out some of our faves:

As this beautiful bride was getting ready to walk down the aisle, the skies cleared and the rain went away! It was the perfect wedding scenery at the Casa Marina in Key West. After their “I Do’s” we really enjoyed taking pictures with them and the infamous sunset. These guys partied like rock stars and enjoyed their wedding to the fullest with all their family and friends that came down. See for yourselves some of the best shots from this awesome wedding. Congrats again guys on your big day, we love you!

title.rendered: Smathers Beach Wedding | Key West

content.rendered:
This lovely couple from Philadelphia, Jennifer and Christopher, met online. They’ve been inseparable ever since! Along with their family, they came down for a sweet, romantic, destination wedding on the beautiful Smathers Beach in Key West. Definitely an excellent choice!

A gorgeous day in Key West

These two look like they came from the Vogue magazine.  After their ceremony, we took some beautiful shots at the Casa Marina in Key West. See for yourselves this beautiful wedding. Congrats again on your wedding!

Smathers Beach: The Perfect Wedding Destination

When it comes to saying “I do”, there is no place more magical than Smathers Beach in Key West, Florida. With its sugar-white sand and turquoise waters, Smathers Beach is the perfect setting for a romantic beach wedding.

Located just a short drive from Key West, Smathers Beach is easily accessible for all your guests. And with its convenient location, there is no need to worry about guests getting lost or running late.

If you are looking for a beach wedding destination that is truly unique and unforgettable, then look no further than Smathers Beach in Key West, Florida!

Why Smathers Beach is the perfect wedding destination

Smathers Beach is the perfect destination for your beach wedding for a number of reasons.

First, the beach is absolutely beautiful and is sure to provide a stunning backdrop for your wedding photos.

Second, the beach is conveniently located and is easily accessible for all your guests. And finally, the beach is a unique and unforgettable setting for your wedding day.

Make your wedding day unforgettable at Smathers Beach

There are a number of ways to make your wedding day at Smathers Beach truly unforgettable. A stunning wedding dress will surely compliment the beach setting and make you stand out.

Opting in for a beach-themed wedding cake is sure to impress your guests. And planning to say your “I do’s” at sunset will make a truly romantic and unforgettable experience.

Casa Marina – an incredible Key West venue for your wedding

If you are looking for an incredible Key West venue for your beach wedding, look no further than Casa Marina. Casa Marina is a historic oceanfront resort that offers a variety of unique and beautiful event spaces for your wedding.

From the stunning beachfront lawn to the elegant ballroom, Casa Marina is sure to have a space that is perfect for your wedding. If you are searching for a true beachside wedding venue, look no further than the intimate Casa Marina beach. This unique spot is perfect for a small wedding or elopement and offers beautiful views of the water. The charming Pavilion provides an ideal place to exchange your vows, with its scenic views of the sand and sea.

For something truly unique, check out the stunning Casa Marina Courtyard. This romantic setting is complete with oversized hanging lanterns and bubbling fountains that create a one-of-a-kind atmosphere for your big day. The gorgeous courtyard also provides plenty of room for dining and dancing – making it perfect for an outdoor reception under the stars.

Casa Marina also features a variety of indoor event spaces to suit every taste. The elegant Key West Ballroom has high ceilings and beautiful chandeliers, while the oceanfront banquet room boasts stunning views of the water. If you are looking for a slightly more laid-back atmosphere, try holding your wedding in the historic Library Bar or on the spacious Outdoor Terrace.

Key west is truly the ultimate South Florida destination to get married

When It comes to weddings, Key west is truly the ultimate South Florida destination to get married. Why? The weather is beautiful all year long, the island vibe and crystal-clear waters offer a truly unique setting, and there are tons of great venues to choose from.

Whether you’re looking for a beachfront ceremony or a grand ballroom affair, you can find it in Key West. And with so many things to do on the island, your guests will be extremely entertained, and feel like they’re on vacation while having so much fun during your most special day!
